titles.title: You may have the joy bells

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You may have the joy bells ringing in your heart And a peace that from you never will depart Walk the straight and narrow way live for Jesus everyday He will keep the joy bells ringing in your heart

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: Joy bells ringing in your heart :/ Take the savior here below With you everywhere you go He will keep the joy bells ringing in your heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Love of Jesus in its fullness you may know And this love to those around you sweetly show Words of kindness always say Deads of mercy do each day Then He'll keep the joy bells ringing in your heart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let your life speak well of Jesus everyday Own His regret to every service you can pay Sinners you can help to win If your life is pure and clean And you keep the joy bells ringing in your heart
